item.title: Yes, its an accurate translation.

item.title: If they didn't have double standards ...
item.description: (Peter Kyle is a minister in the Labour government, which the right loves to criticise for having a "two tier" approach to justice favouring the left. In fact, however, it favours the right).

item.title: Batman sacrifices a secret
item.description:
Batman (Kevin Conroy) and Zatanna (Jennifer Hale) face the sorceress Circe (Rachel York) after she transformed Wonder Woman (Susan Eisenberg) into an animal Source: Justice League Unlimited S01E05 (edit by yours truly)
Kevin Conroy (1955 - 2022)
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: A Dose of American History
item.description:
Historian: Jermain Fowler I'd like to add that this goes for many other nations. This post isn't just to shit on America but Russia, the UK, China, Germany, etc. are just as vile. There are too many to name.
https://www.npca.org/articles/10673-parks-group-demands-truth-history-of-slavery-cannot-be-erased-from-our
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: " Everyone thinks I caught our office lunch thief. I didn’t. I started packing them a meal on purpose"
item.dc:creator: Hedgehawg2

item.title: I devote this dump to YOUR wife so I can close tabs, pt 42 ft. the majestic skedaddle bird and all the Arepo I'm aware of.
item.description:
It is actually Wednesday, my dudes, dudettes, and others. Gentle reminder to take your meds and hydrate. Take your meds with a full glass of water! That's how they're made to be taken!
Your swamp will dry out if you don't drink water. Be the bog you want to see in the world. Maintain your biodiversity!
I love this. Some comic book writers better be taking notes on this fantastic idea.
Where are you going, birb? Do you have somewhere to be? Some pressing appointment, perhaps?
I fucking love these. Happy happy birthday, happy birthday youuu
The last time I saw something by this guy was with the whole CIA Contra cocaine thing. Good stuff.
Gently spike the raccoon. Wham-splat, coon's a jumper for sure.
So goddamn good. Oh, dang. I bet a loop of this would make to fall asleep to, especially if another song is keeping you up.
How do you even come up with this concept...?
Aw. Chimp friend. As I commented on someone else's post, this shows that at least one chimp recognizes that our smiles are not dominance displays, but signs of friendship. Crazy that they're learning that their instincts aren't the be-all, end-all of social interaction.
Mm... monke.
I'm feeling good about my odds here.
I find stuff like this absolutely fascinating. Same with the one where they show how they set concrete in rivers for bridges. If there's a youtube channel for this kind of visual learning, I'd love to know about it.
Bread is so good, though. Love me some french bread. Barely toasted, plenty of butter.
Shine on, you funky little dinosaur. Peepeepeep!
It's wednesday, but we can still get tacos. Who's with me?!
Yep, fair. You and me both, sleep paralysis demon. You and me both.
What a trip. Idk, I think I'd do... most of that stuff. Probably not heroin, though.
Squid! Noodle!
I wonder if she got it eventually.
Hangry gato has much to say.
patapatapatapata
item.dc:creator: J4nein4ne
cannibalthemusical

item.title: Stupid idea from a tired brain
item.description: Given how AI data centers are just hogging power and water and the such, I’m just thinking “be pretty cool if this happened”. But like the title says, I’m tired, literally just woke up. Thought I’d post this as I’m eating breakfast.

item.title: I’m glad he passed.
item.description: Fuck Charlie Kirk. I’ll exercise my 1st amendment rights wherever I please. He was a racist piece of shit. I’m not scared of losing my job. If I do, it’s been worth it to say it out loud. I’m tired of seeing people glorify his bigoted views.
item.dc:creator: Gerdwo

COVER ARTIST: Ismail Inceoglu
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Stay Forever - Lost Son YouTube: https://youtu.be/omHVD2c1pw0?si=OSBgsqOM5I6jn-5A Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/34y1ZZ4FbvQxm4VPWHySTM?si=649d922ccb8c4b38

Bruno Pontiroli
By Nego in Torrellas
Ricardo Lima
Z-Ray
Esra Eslen
Aku
slothbeing
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Happy 74th Birthday Elvira, Mistress of the Dark! (Cassandra Peterson)
item.description:
Born: Cassandra Gay Peterson September 17, 1951, Manhattan, Kansas, U.S.
LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA - OCTOBER 19: Actress Cassandra Peterson attends The Groundlings' 50th Anniversary Party at Jonathan Club on October 19, 2024 in Los Angeles, California. (Photo by Amanda Edwards/Getty Images)
